title: Visual Continuity
message: The station image was brought into closer alignment with the WIRE-38 house style.

title: Morning Transmission
message: Episode 007 entered the public archive after the morning broadcast cycle.

title: Archive Synchronization
message: The public archive began carrying direct references to the broadcast record.

title: Public Reception
message: A public reception point was established for the Longwave Service.

title: Transmission Archive
message: The first six WIRE-38 transmissions were indexed for public review.

title: Channel Established
message: An external receiving point was opened for early transmission records.

title: Initial Construction
message: Initial station apparatus was assembled after the longwave broadcast concept took form.

title: Origin Note
message: The idea of an unattended, twenty-four-hour public bulletin signal was first recorded.

title: First Broadcast
message: The first WIRE-38 transmission was recorded and published to YouTube shortly after.
